column1: Destructible metal crate. Always drops a weapon, as long as someone has been killed
Destructible pallet that slides on the ground
Destructible wooden crate. Drops no weapons
Distorts the screen when the player is close to it. Distance dictates how far away from the object the camera starts getting distorted
Does a variety of things when triggered. Set the action to 3 to end the level. See the guide channel for details!!!
Flies into any nearby enemies with a different team
Kills any living being that touches it
Ladder. Climbmable from the left side
Ladder. Climbmable from the right side
Lets only one side through. Works with rotation
Makes all uncovered crates and such snow-covered. Use in snow levels
Makes any entities within it slowly suffocate
Moves anything lying on it. Set the speed X and Y to your desired move direction
